info.description: Collateral statements in Aladdin are generated on a daily basis by Aladdin's margin calculators referencing legal agreement set up in DECO, security details, pricing and position data. The generated statements are viewable in the DECO tool. This API allows for retrieval and filtering of collateral statement and collateral detail data (exposure, collateral held, collateral pledged), using a number of criteria including Statement ID, Broker, Portfolio, Statement Type, Agreement Type and more
info.title: Collateral Statements

get.description: Retrieves a unique collateral statement and detail record for a single statement ID.

Any.description:
`Any` contains an arbitrary serialized message along with a
URL that describes the type of the serialized message

@type.description: A URL/resource name that uniquely identifies the type of the serialized message.

brokerBrokerReference.description:
Reference to a broker: this include the broker id, broker ticker and broker shortname.
For read operations, all fields are returned.
For write operations, at least one field is required. If multiple fields are provided, broker_id takes precedence followed by broker_shortname.

brokerShortname.title: broker shortname - display name for the broker across Aladdin apps

portfolioPortfolioReference.description:
Reference to a portfolio. This includes both the portfolio ID and the portfolio ticker. 
For read operations, both fields are returned. 
For write operations, only one of the two is required. 
If both are provided, the portfolio ID takes precedence over the portfolio ticker.

rpcStatus.description:
The `Status` type defines a logical error model that is suitable for
different programming environments, including REST APIs and RPC APIs. It is
used by [gRPC](https://github.com/grpc). Each `Status` message contains
three pieces of data: error code, error message, and error details.

You can find out more about this error model and how to work with it in the
[API Design Guide](https://cloud.google.com/apis/design/errors).

code.description: The status code, which should be an enum value of [google.rpc.Code][google.rpc.Code].

message.description:
A developer-facing error message, which should be in English. Any
user-facing error message should be localized and sent in the
[google.rpc.Status.details][google.rpc.Status.details] field, or localized by the client.

details.description:
A list of messages that carry the error details.  There is a common set of
message types for APIs to use.

id.title: Aladdin asset Identifier. This is same as Asset ID

marketCountryCode.title: Asset Trading market an ISO code to identify markets, trading platforms

ticker.title: Aladdin Asset Ticker - a unique series of letters assigned to a security for trading purposes

riskCountryCode.title: Country of risk i.e which buys the asset

benchmarkAssetId.description: benchmark portfolio or a security corresponding to an asset id.

issueDate.description: Issue Date represents the date the Security/Asset was issued.

accrualDate.description: Accrual Date represents the Valuation Date for the Asset.

v1CollateralStatement.description: Collateral statement describes the collateral statement details.

externalEntityValue.description: Counterparty identifier stored in Security Master under Counterparty Reference Number.

returnFund.description: Amount to be returned by fund.

returnBroker.description: Amount to be returned by broker.

statementModifyUser.description: User that modify the statement last.

statementComment.description: Represents the comments on that statement.

minTransferAmtFund.description: Minimum transfer amount of the fund.

minTransferAmtBroker.description: Minimum transfer amount of the broker.

collateralExposure.description: Represents the Collateral Exposures for the statement.

totalPriceAlignmentInterest.title: Total sum of Price Alignment Interest

statementSubType.description: Captures the sub-category of the statement business flow. Decode: DECO_ST_SUBTYPE.

error.description: The error result of the operation in case of failure or cancellation.

output.description: The normal response of the operation in case of success.

v1DecoAgreementType.description:
- DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: DECO agreement type unspecified
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_ISDA: DECO agreement type ISDA w/ CSA
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_INC: DECO agreement type ISDA w/o CSA
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_ISCO: DECO agreement type ISDA Client Own
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_IMUM: DECO agreement type Uncleared Margin IM
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_IMUS: DECO agreement type Initial Margin - US SEC/SBS
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_IMLB: DECO agreement type Triparty Long Box
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_ISFX: DECO agreement type ISDA FX
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_ISSC: DECO agreement type Securities Conversion
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_SWAO: DECO agreement type Swap - Other
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_CFD: DECO agreement type CFD Agreements
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_DRV: DECO agreement type Swaps - Rahmenvertrag
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_FUT: DECO agreement type FUT
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_FUTG: DECO agreement type FUT Give Up
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_GMRA: DECO agreement type GMRA
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_GMRT: DECO agreement type GMRA Tri
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_OTC: DECO agreement type OTC
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_PSA: DECO agreement type PSA
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_PSAT: DECO agreement type PSA Tri
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_SLPN: DECO agreement type SecLend P-Notes
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_GSLA: DECO agreement type Global Master Securities Lending Agreement
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_MSLA: DECO agreement type Master Securities Lending Agreement
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_OSLA: DECO agreement type Overseas Securities Lending Agreement
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_SLA: DECO agreement type Securities Lending Agreement
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_LOPT: DECO agreement type Listed Options
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_MCA: DECO agreement type Master Confirmation Agreement
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_DMCA: DECO agreement type DTCC Master Confirmation Agreement
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_MTRX: DECO agreement type ISDA Credit Derivatives Physical Settlement Matrix
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_STS: DECO agreement type Standard Terms Supplement
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_TBA: DECO agreement type MSFTA
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_FA: DECO agreement type Futures Addendum
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_FAVM: DECO agreement type Futures Addendum VM
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_EA: DECO agreement type Execution Agreement
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_CCAS: DECO agreement type Central Cpty Acct Setup
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_SYNS: DECO agreement type CFD Synthetic Sleeve
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_DFEM: DECO agreement type DF2/EMIR
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_SUPD: DECO agreement type Supplemental Documentation
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_ISAR: DECO agreement type ISDA - Archived
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_PBFA: DECO agreement type PB Financing Agreement
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_SDAA: DECO agreement type State Deposit Account Agreement
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_TMFS: DECO agreement type Threshold Monitoring - Forward Settle
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_TMNP: DECO agreement type Threshold Monitoring - Not Papered
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_DINSUR: DECO agreement type INSUR-COLL
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_PBTB: DECO agreement type PB TBA Clearing
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_SCEC: DECO agreement type US Equity/ Corporate Debt
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_SCGD: DECO agreement type US Government Debt
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_SCIE: DECO agreement type US International Equity
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_CRIM: DECO agreement type Repo Initial Margin Addendum
 - DECO_AGREEMENT_TYPE_CRVM: DECO agreement type Repo Varition Margin Addendum
v1DecoAgreementType.title: DECO agreement type

v1DecoStatementType.description:
- DECO_STATEMENT_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Unspecified DECO statement type
 - DECO_STATEMENT_TYPE_A: DECO statement type cleared
 - DECO_STATEMENT_TYPE_B: DECO statement type exchange traded derivatives
 - DECO_STATEMENT_TYPE_C: DECO statement type cleared
 - DECO_STATEMENT_TYPE_D: DECO statement type OTC bilateral
 - DECO_STATEMENT_TYPE_E: DECO statement type exchange traded derivatives
 - DECO_STATEMENT_TYPE_L: DECO statement type Sec Lending Cash
 - DECO_STATEMENT_TYPE_R: DECO statement type CFD rate reset
 - DECO_STATEMENT_TYPE_S: DECO statement type substitution
 - DECO_STATEMENT_TYPE_U: DECO statement type OTC bilateral
 - DECO_STATEMENT_TYPE_H: DECO statement type Sec Lending Non Cash
 - DECO_STATEMENT_TYPE_O: DECO statement type Cleared Repo
 - DECO_STATEMENT_TYPE_M: DECO statement type End-of-day
 - DECO_STATEMENT_TYPE_X: DECO statement type cancelled
 - DECO_STATEMENT_TYPE_UMR: DECO statement type bilateral
v1DecoStatementType.title: DECO statement type

thirdPartyExposure.title: Collateral exposure calculated by a third party

supportRequired.title:
Asset-level support_required, the exposure value adjusted by the net money on the trade
(-- api-linter: core::0203::required=disabled
 aip.dev/not-precedent: The required in the description does not mean this is must-have field ... --)

v1FilterCollateralStatementsQuery.description: The query with the parameters needed to perform a filter operation.

statementDate.description: Filter the results by the statement date.

statementType.description: Filter the results by type of collateral statement.

statementDetailEnrichmentFlag.description: Flag to control the level of enrichment of the collateral data.

assetEnrichmentFlag.description: Flag to control the level of enrichment of the collateral asset data.

agreementType.description: Filter the results for type of collateral agreement.

externEntity.description: Filter the results based on an extern entity value.

clearedFlag.description: Flag to extract uncleared statements only.

portfolioGroupId.description: Get statements for a portfolio group.

portfolioTicker.description: Filter the results for type of  portfolio name.

brokerShortName.description: Filter the results for type of broker short name.

modifiedAfterTime.description:
(-- api-linter: core::0140::prepositions=disabled
    aip.dev/not-precedent: For the query it needs to be clear that we will retrieve statements after
    the timestamp provided. --)
(-- api-linter: core::0142::time-field-names=disabled
    aip.dev/not-precedent: This is the most descriptive name for the query parameter.  --)
Filter the results for statements generated after a given timestamp.

excludeCollateralPledgeHeldFlag.description: Flag to extract uncleared pledge held flag.

bilateralFlag.description: Flag to extract bilateral report, it will exclude  cancelled statement .

pageSize.description:
The maximum number of collateral statement records. The service may
return fewer than this value. If unspecified, at most 500
collateral statement records will be returned. The maximum value is 2000; values
above 500 will be coerced to 500.

pageToken.description:
A page token, received from a previous 'CollateralStatement' call.
Provide this to retrieve the subsequent page.

When paginating, all other parameters provided to
'CollateralStatement' must match the call that provided the page
token.

v1FilterCollateralStatementsResponse.description: The response for filter collateral statement method.

collateralStatements.description: The lending trading indicator entities that match the specified FilterCollateralStatementRequest.

responseNote.title: Response note sent to the frontend if the statements are truncated

nextPageToken.description:
A token, which can be sent as 'page_token' to retrieve the next page.
If this field is omitted, there are no subsequent pages.

v1LongrunningOperation.description:
LongrunningOperation represents a long-running operation that is the result
of a network API call.

id.description:
The server-assigned id, which is only unique within the same service that
originally returns it. If you use the default HTTP mapping, the
`id` should have the format of `operations/some/unique/id`.

meta.description:
Service-specific metadata associated with the operation.  It typically
contains progress information and common metadata such as create time.
Some services might not provide such metadata.  Any method that returns a
long-running operation should document the metadata type, if any.

done.description:
If the value is `false`, it means the operation is still in progress.
If true, the operation is completed, and either `error` or `response` is
available.

error.description: The error result of the operation in case of failure or cancellation.

response.description:
The normal response of the operation in case of success.  If the original
method returns no data on success, such as `Delete`, the response is
`google.protobuf.Empty`.  If the original method is standard
`Get`/`Create`/`Update`, the response should be the resource.  For other
methods, the response should have the type `XxxResponse`, where `Xxx`
is the original method name.  For example, if the original method name
is `TakeSnapshot()`, the inferred response type is
`TakeSnapshotResponse`.

v1MarketCode.title: Market code represents a market ID, like ISIN or SEDOL

id.description: Asset identifier associated with this market code.
id.title: Asset identifier

idType.title:
(-- api-linter: aladdin::0901::dictionary-message-field=disabled
    aip.dev/not-precedent: Open-ended connected to Decodes. --)
Type of security identifier eg ISIN, SEDOL, CIN, RIC etc.
Use the exact string value from the decde column from B_ALIAS decodes table. For example, identifierType = 'ISIN (ISO)"

idCode.description: Represents the alias code. This field is optional when the identifierType is a public identifier like RIC, ISIN, SEDOL, etc.

v1Position.description: Represents the position for exposures and collateral held/pledged.

positionValueStatus.description: Valuation status. This will contain error if there was an issue with the exposure calculation such as missing prices.

positionValueStatusMessage.description: Long explation of the valuation status and also additional information such as assignment status.

positionDuration.title:
Represents duration.
(-- api-linter: core::0142::time-field-type=disabled
    aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this because duration is not a time but a double value. --)

recordType.description: MTM = Mark to market, STL = Unsettled trade proceeds, PMT = Swap payments marked as failed in Paycheck  or NULL for Collateral.

collateralValuationPct.title: Valuation percent. Also referred to as the haircut

previousMarkToMarket.title:
(-- api-linter: core::0140::prepositions=disabled
    aip.dev/not-precedent: We need to do this due to the business significance of the term MTM. --)
Previous mark to market

priceAlignmentInterest.title:
(-- api-linter: aladdin::0901::prefix-required-field=disabled
    aip.dev/not-precedent: Price here is the prefix. It is a qualifier for interest. --)
Price alignment interest (PAI)

priceAlignmentInterestRate.title:
(-- api-linter: aladdin::0901::prefix-required-field=disabled
    aip.dev/not-precedent: Price here is the prefix. It is a qualifier for interest. --)
Price alignment interest rate

fees.title:
(-- api-linter: core::0144::message-field-plural=disabled
    aip.dev/not-precedent: We are keeping the commonly used term for sum of fees --)
Fees

dirtyPrice.title: Dirty price, calculated from clean price and accrued interest

collateralPriceDate.description: Price hierarchy price date from spdb.

collateralPriceSource.description: Price hierarchy price source from spdb.

v1UpdateCollateralStatementRequest.title: Request to update a given statement

allowMissing.title: Can the target statement be missing

updateMask.description: The list of fields to update.

v1UpdateCollateralStatementResult.title: Result for individual collateral statement update

error.title: The error result of the operation

output.description: The normal response of the operation in case of success.

OAuth2AccessCode.description: This API uses OAuth 2.0 with the access code flow.

scopes.investment_operations.collateral_managem: This grants access to all endpoints in the investment_operations.collateral_management.collateral_statement.v1.CollateralStatement API
scopes.offline_access: This keeps you signed in to the app, even when you are not using it.

OAuth2ClientCredentials.description: This API uses OAuth 2.0 with the client credentials flow.

scopes.investment_operations.collateral_managem: This grants access to all endpoints in the investment_operations.collateral_management.collateral_statement.v1.CollateralStatement API
scopes.offline_access: This keeps you signed in to the app, even when you are not using it.
